name: ViewSettings
summary: The settings of a navigator view

properties.name: modelViewOptions
properties.summary: The name of the model view options. If empty, the view has custom model view options.

properties.name: layerCombination
properties.summary: The name of the layer combination. If empty, the view has custom layer combination.

properties.name: dimensionStyle
properties.summary: The name of the dimension style. If empty, the view has custom dimension style.

properties.name: penSetName
properties.summary: The name of the pen set. If empty, the view has custom pen set.

properties.name: graphicOverrideCombination
properties.summary: The name of the graphic override combination. If empty, the view has custom graphic override combination.

properties.name: drawingScale
properties.summary: The drawing scale stored on the view, if enabled.

properties.name: saveZoom
properties.summary: Whether the zoom box is stored in the view.

properties.name: ignoreSavedZoom
properties.summary: Whether changing to the view should ignore its stored zoom.

properties.name: zoom
properties.summary: Stored zoom box in model coordinates. Used only when saveZoom is true.
